title: Long-Term Forecasts for DC, DM and DR Requirements
description: The dataset contains forecasts of our Dynamic Containment/Dynamic Moderation/Dynamic Regulation's Low and High requirements for the next 12 months. The methodology uses forecasted demand, inertia, and response volumes as well as a view of the largest losses on the system to estimate the DC requirements. The actual requirements day-ahead are likely to change based on optimisation carried out closer to real-time coupled with greater visibility of inertia, demand, and loss sizes.
